channel.title: Home on Haocheng Liu
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Haocheng Liu

item.description: Projects # \(\) Research on multi-frequency mixed signal decomposition method | Bachelor Thesis, Sep. 2020 – Jun. 2021 # Part of a state-level topic in China and supervised by Prof. Dongmei Fu, Bio-inspired computing Lab, Beijing Proposed a signal decomposition algorithm based on variational method which is scene adaptive on non-stationary signal and has higher accuracy compared with EMD, VMD in analysis of ECG signals and bearing signals Analysed the signals and trends of corrosive atmospheric components ( \(Cl^{-}, SO_2\) ) around mainland China based on galvanic corrosion data collected by observation stations of State Grid Corporation of China (SGCC) Programmed a signal decomposition and feature extraction toolbox (Copyright Registration: No.

item.title: About
item.description: About # Hi, this is my personal website. Welcome to contact me.
